title: Pavlova (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Beat egg whites until soft peaks.
Bake at low heat for 1 hour.
Top with whipped cream and fruits.
Also added a dash of lemon zest and topped with passion fruit.

source_review.text: Perfect pavlova! Added a splash of vanilla and a pinch of salt. Also added a dash of lemon zest and topped with passion fruit.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile of the pavlova with additional complementary ingredients.

changes_made.to_text: Also added a dash of lemon zest and topped with passion fruit.

source_review.text: Used berries and kiwi for topping. Added extra vanilla and a pinch of cream of tartar. Served with mango coulis.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile and presentation of the dish

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: Enhances the flavor profile of the pavlova with additional complementary ingredients.; Enhances the flavor profile and presentation of the dish
